subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! The Wronged One of the world calleth unto thee from the Most Great Prison, and summoneth thee unto the Truth, exalted be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله مظلوم عالم از سجن اعظم ترا ندا میفرماید و بحق جل جلاله دعوت مینماید
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment
